query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  COUNT(content_fingerprint) as has_fingerprint,
  COUNT(creative_id) as has_creative_id,
  COUNT(image_url) as has_image_url,
  COUNT(reach) as has_reach,
  COUNT(frequency) as has_frequency,
  COUNT(impressions) as has_impressions,
  COUNT(spend) as has_spend,
  COUNT(adset_name) as has_adset_name,
  MIN(date) as earliest_date,
  MAX(date) as latest_date
FROM ad_performance;
